title: Crunchy German Hazelnut Fritters
description: A fun and kid-friendly German dessert featuring hazelnuts and chocolate.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the flour and baking powder.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the sugar, eggs, and melted butter.
Add the yogurt to the wet ingredients and whisk until combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the chopped hazelnuts and tempered chocolate.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and stir until just combined.
Using a cookie scoop, drop rounded balls of the dough onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake at 375°F for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Transfer the fritters to a wire rack and let cool completely.
